attachments.fallback: How to Convert DBX File to PST? - @Samantha
attachments.text: I suggest the GainTools DBX to PST Converter Tool to convert DBX file to PST with damaging any database files. The software help users to migrtae bulk emails from Outlook Express into Outlook PST file. To get more details use the free demo edition before buying full license.
